concept: Camping: where your bed has rocks, your food has smoke, and your bathroom has trees.
title: Funny Camping Shirt - Relatable Joke for Campers and Outdoor Lovers
description:
Camping has it all: questionable sleeping arrangements, smoky snacks, and natural plumbing. It's the ultimate survival experience that we keep choosing for reasons we'll never fully understand. Whether you're a weekend warrior hauling a tent or a seasoned camper with a pop-up trailer, this design speaks to the rugged absurdity of life outdoors. 

Perfect for: 
- The camper who still hasn’t mastered the art of sleeping on a cot without pain.
- Fans of campfires, s'mores, and too many bug bites.
- Anyone who thinks 'roughing it' builds character — even if it also builds calluses.

DETAILS: Fun, relatable typography spelling out a funny camping phrase. Available in a full range of light and dark background colors. Designed for outdoor enthusiasts and made-to-order just for you!

100% Airlume combed and ring-spun cotton (Bella Canvas 3001) — lightweight 4.2 oz/yd² (142 g/m²) for breathability
Retail crew neckline with ribbed knit collar and shoulder tape for shape retention
Side seams and tear-away label for fit stability and comfort
Vibrant, crisp printing: DTF or DTG depending on provider for detailed sleeve/label prints
Ethically sourced/REACH certified; blank product sourced from Honduras; multiple fabric blends for heathered colors

Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F)
Non-chlorine: bleach as needed
Tumble dry: low heat
Iron, steam or dry: medium heat
Do not dryclean

Shipped by BanterWearCo. Questions? Message me — I respond faster than a teenager asked to take out the trash. (Low bar, admittedly.)
